title: salvia officinalis subsp. tomentosa
intro: Salvia officinalis subsp. tomentosa, also known as woolly sage or downy sage, is a subspecies of the sage plant, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis subsp. tomentosa include reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function, as well as providing relief from menopausal symptoms and digestive issues. Salvia officinalis subsp. tomentosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are all used in traditional herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
